CREATE TABLE encryption_test (comment String, secret String);
SELECT comment, decrypt('aes-256-ecb', secret, '12345678910121314151617181920212') as plaintext FROM encryption_test;
SELECT comment, decrypt('aes-128-cbc', secret, '1234567891012131') as plaintext FROM encryption_test;
SELECT comment, decrypt('aes-256-gcm', secret, '12345678910121314151617181920212', '1234567890123456', 'aad_data') as plaintext FROM encryption_test;
SELECT comment, decrypt('aes-192-ctr', secret, '12345678910121314151617181920212') as plaintext FROM encryption_test WHERE comment LIKE 'Test%';
SELECT comment, (SELECT decrypt('aes-256-ecb', t.secret, '12345678910121314151617181920212') FROM encryption_test t WHERE t.comment = e.comment) as plaintext FROM encryption_test e;
SELECT e.comment, decrypt('aes-256-cbc', e.secret, '12345678910121314151617181920212') as plaintext FROM encryption_test e JOIN encryption_test t ON e.comment != t.comment;
SELECT comment, decrypt('aes-128-ofb', secret, '1234567891012131') as plaintext FROM encryption_test WHERE comment IN ('Test1', 'Test2');
SELECT comment, decrypt('aes-192-gcm', secret, '12345678910121314151617181920212', '1234567890123456', 'aad_data') as plaintext FROM encryption_test WHERE comment = 'Test3';

SELECT comment, decrypt('aes-128-gcm', secret, '1234567891012131', '1234567890123456', 'aad_data') as plaintext FROM encryption_test UNION ALL SELECT comment, 'Decryption Failed' FROM encryption_test WHERE decrypt('aes-128-gcm', secret, 'incorrect_key', '1234567890123456', 'aad_data') IS NULL;
